hook: Self-respect becomes visible when you stop over-offering to earn a place in someone else's life.
body: The strongest signal is not indifference; it is proportion.

hook: Trying to be extra useful, extra accommodating, or extra available often masks fear of not being chosen.
body: Offer warmth and effort in proportion to what is actually being built together.

hook: Offer warmth and effort in proportion to what is actually being built together.
body: Matching investment is healthier than front-loading huge emotional labor before trust exists.

hook: Matching investment is healthier than front-loading huge emotional labor before trust exists.
body: Notice where you routinely give more than the stage of the connection justifies, and reduce that by one notch.
